meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build a high-impact technical portfolio that proves your SaaS building expertise to investors and customers.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap by deploying high-utility AI agents using Claude Code. By integrating Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding, you transform abstract ideas into production-grade micro-SaaS projects. This workflow produces verifiable code samples, demonstrating technical authority and rapid execution speed to potential clients and investors immediately.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS market is that nobody cares about your ideas; they care about your capacity to ship. When you lack a portfolio, you are invisible to the capital and the customers you need. The gap between an 'idea-person' and a 'founder' is a trail of deployed, functional code that solves real-world pain points.

We are bridging that gap today. By leveraging Claude Code to automate architectural heavy-lifting and Antigravity to structure your development environment, we will turn your lack of history into a display of high-velocity engineering. Stop explaining what you can do and start showing the logs of what you have built.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Define your SaaS domain and use Antigravity to generate a clean, modular repository structure that signals senior-level engineering standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready repository structure for a Next.js/Supabase SaaS boilerplate with strict TypeScript typing, feature-based directory organization, and comprehensive testing suites.

steps.title: Defining Core Business Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to translate your core value proposition into robust service layers, ensuring the code is readable and maintainable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for a subscription-based AI tool that handles Stripe integration, user authentication, and data persistence using Prisma.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement core subscription service layer with stripe webhooks'

steps.title: Automated Test-Driven Development
steps.description: A portfolio without tests is a hobby. Use Claude Code to generate unit and integration tests that prove your commitment to quality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Jest unit tests for the core service layer, covering edge cases in authentication and database transaction failures.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate comprehensive jest test suite for the new service layer'

steps.title: API Documentation and Swagger Integration
steps.description: Professional founders document their work. Automate your API docs to show you understand developer experience (DX).
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Swagger/OpenAPI documentation for all current API endpoints, ensuring proper schema definition and response examples.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate openapi spec for all routes in /api directory'

steps.title: Deployment and Live Demo
steps.description: The final proof. Use Claude Code to configure your CI/CD pipeline, ensuring your project is live and accessible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests on push and deploys the application to Vercel upon merge to main.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure github actions for automated testing and vercel deployment'

pro_tips: Always commit your Claude Code session logs to a 'docs/build-logs' directory to show the 'how' behind your code.
Refactor generated code manually; AI produces the skeleton, but your stylistic touch proves it is human-verified.
Focus on 'Hard Problems' like concurrency or complex data transformation to differentiate your portfolio from basic tutorials.
Use Antigravity to enforce strict linting rules; professional codebases are defined by their constraints, not just their features.
Build a 'public-facing' version of your internal admin tools to showcase your ability to handle business operations, not just UI.
content.next_steps: Deploy these projects to a dedicated GitHub organization, write a 300-word 'Engineering Journal' for each project explaining the technical trade-offs you made, and link these to your LinkedIn profile.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop being a spectator. By deploying these modules, you are building the proof of work that separates winners from dreamers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
